name: CENTCOM — Iranian COMINT corridor
description: Synthetic CENTCOM scenario in the Strait of Hormuz. Operator runs a small ISR UAS off a forward operating base. Iranian-style assets are pre-placed: a vehicular COMINT van on the coastal road, a generic peer wide-band DF further inland, and a generic airborne SIGINT pod on a high-altitude orbit. Demonstrates the same EMCON math against Iranian/peer threat templates — operator must avoid lock at sub-90s dwell.

adversaries.note: Iranian COMINT vehicle ~10 km NE — coastal road, direct LoS
Generic peer wide-band DF ~10 km E — vehicular SIGINT/DF asset
Airborne SIGINT pod ~13 km NW — high-orbit, fast time-to-fix
